jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager, Growth
jobs.description: Headquarters: Remote in the US Who we are About Stripe Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world's largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career. About the team Product Marketing is a global team of capable, friendly, user-oriented marketers, partnering closely with Stripe's world-class product
jobs.why: Growth PMM sits closest to conversion optimization, direct-response copy, and growth funnels where your creative strategy background applies best.
jobs.proposal_opener: If you need conversion-driven copy and creative hook testing to fuel Stripe's acquisition funnels, I bring direct-response rigor to growth messaging.
jobs.flags: Senior tech role - frame your performance copywriting and hook analysis experience
jobs.summary: Stripe is seeking a Growth Product Marketing Manager to drive user acquisition and expansion across its product suite. The position focuses on growth loops, conversion messaging, and strategic acquisition experiments.

jobs.why: A core Product Marketing Manager role at Stripe that requires strong value proposition craft, messaging hierarchy, and customer communication.
jobs.proposal_opener: I craft clear, benefit-driven product copy and onboarding messaging that turns technical capabilities into obvious business value.
jobs.flags: Senior tech role - highlight core copywriting and value-proposition design
jobs.summary: Stripe is looking for a generalist Product Marketing Manager to lead end-to-end product launches and strategic positioning. The role spans customer messaging, go-to-market planning, and cross-functional channel execution.

About the team Our Product Marketing team’s mission is to generate customer insights that inform Stripe’s product strategy, and lead go-to-market for ou
jobs.why: Stripe PMM roles are mid-to-senior level tech positions, but your positioning and direct-response messaging skills offer a solid hook.
jobs.proposal_opener: Turn complex risk management technology into clear, high-converting product messaging that drives enterprise adoption.
jobs.flags: Senior tech PMM role - position as a sharp product messaging specialist
jobs.summary: Stripe is hiring a Product Marketing Manager for Radar, their automated fraud prevention product line. The role focuses on developing go-to-market strategies, product positioning, and developer-facing messaging.

That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career. About the team Our Product Marketing team's mission is to generate customer insights that inform Stripe's product
jobs.why: This role centers heavily on market research and competitive intelligence, though your offer positioning skills provide useful crossover.
jobs.proposal_opener: I specialize in analyzing market angles and translating research insights into compelling, targeted copy positioning.
jobs.flags: Senior role focused on competitive intelligence - emphasize positioning skills

jobs.title: Werkstudent Digital Marketing & Sales (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Die Modern Drive Technology GmbH (MDT) ist ein Full-Service IoT-Integrator zur Vernetzung von Maschinen, Fahrzeugen, Komponenten und Anlagen. Mit unserer offenen IoT-Plattform und dem umfangreichen Hardware-Ökosystem ermöglichen wir Unternehmen mit industriellem Kerngeschäft, ihre Einheiten schnell und unkompliziert zu digitalisieren. Unsere Kunden profitieren von Echtzeitdaten, intelligenten Analysen und maßgeschneiderten digitalen Services. Intern treiben wir die Digitalisierung unserer eigenen Marketing- und Vertriebsprozesse konsequent voran – mit einem klaren Fokus auf KI-gestützte Automatisierung und datengetriebenes Wachstum. Aufgaben Wir transformieren – und unser Marketing und Vertr
jobs.why: This is a German-language working student role requiring local German university enrollment and German fluency.
jobs.proposal_opener: I offer direct-response copywriting and digital marketing support to help streamline client acquisition and sales communication.
jobs.flags: Requires German fluency and German student status
jobs.summary: Modern Drive Technology is seeking a working student to support digital marketing and sales initiatives for their industrial IoT platform. The role involves helping digitize client machinery and expanding their hardware ecosystem presence.
